title: Software Update - DFU -  Complete screen
scenario: Firmware update via Device Settings > Software Update shows "Update complete" screen with 100% progress and success message, and tapping "Close" returns to home screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the desired Poly device name to open Device Settings.
4. If an update is available, tap 'Update' to begin the firmware update process.
5. Wait for the firmware update to complete.
6. Observe the screen after the update finishes.
expected: The "Update complete" screen is displayed with a progress bar at 100% and a success message indicating the device has been updated. Tapping "Close" returns the user to the Home screen.
